message:
chore: unexport 9 dead symbols in internal/syncbranch

Unexported CheckDivergence, ResetToRemote, PushSyncBranch,
CheckForcePush, UpdateStoredRemoteSHA, ClearStoredRemoteSHA,
GetStoredRemoteSHA, ForcePushStatus, DivergenceInfo, and
SignificantDivergenceThreshold. None were used outside the package.
